label: 1570 CE
era_summary: 1570 (MDLXX) was a common year starting on Sunday in the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1570: Turkey-Venice, Papal states, 1570-73. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
